rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 3/10 score and rest on the same substantive reasoning: over 15 years of experience and strong TypeScript/cloud skills, but failing the strict 8+ years of production AI requirement and lacking Python, vector databases, and RAG experience. The differences are pure rewording (e.g., 'Founder' vs 'open-source community engagement' both reflect resume content, and the variant simply cites the April 2025 start date already implied in the baseline). Nothing keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Maria Rodriguez.
